name: memspec
description: Discipline-enforcing spec framework: native .memspec DSL + pure-Rust toolchain + agent layer for coupled-state work.

interface.shortDescription: Spec discipline workflows for coupled-state changes
interface.longDescription: Use memspec to decompose, author, scrutinize, implement, and review state-coupled software changes with a native .memspec DSL and Codex workflow skills.
defaultPrompt: Author a memspec slice for this change.
Review this implementation against its memspec.
